purpose: Full structured image-generation prompts for Tempest Table floor bake source assets.

generator_usage.instruction: Use one entry from prompt_jobs at a time. Treat the entire job object as the image prompt.
master_asset_guidance: generate lossless source images as PNG masters
keep all tiles square and seamless
preserve palette consistency within a biome family
for detail decals, leave broad negative space around the feature so they can be composited sparsely

prompt_jobs.purpose: Biome-specific seamless square floor tile source image for dungeon map baking

tileability_requirements: left and right edges must align as a continuous pattern
top and bottom edges must align as a continuous pattern
no unique focal object may touch or favor only one edge
surface detail should be evenly distributed to avoid visible seams
avoid perspective depth cues that break repetition
avoid directional lighting gradients from one side of the tile to the other
global_style_rules.intended_use: repeating floor source for baked map composition

variant_rules.variant_description: baseline variant A with balanced wear and neutral readability

biome.description: Traditional dungeon corridors and chambers.

pattern_structure.base_pattern: large worn flagstones in a repeating but irregular layout
pattern_structure.variation: controlled random variation without breaking uniformity

output_notes.generator_instruction: Treat this full JSON as the image prompt. Prioritize seamless tiling, palette consistency, and compatibility with baked map composition.

transition features must remain tile-safe
avoid perspective depth cues
avoid directional lighting gradients

global_style_rules.fidelity_target: must visually match both connected biome tiles

blending_behavior: fungal material should creep into cracks and seams first
stone should remain readable as the structural base
transition should feel natural and gradual
